nasb.text: Then the Lord saw that the wickedness of man was great on the earth, and that every intent of the thoughts of his heart was only evil continually.

esv.text: The Lord saw that the wickedness of man was great in the earth, and that every intention of the thoughts of his heart was only evil continually.

cnv.text: 耶和華看見人在地上的罪惡很大，終日心裡思念的，盡都是邪惡的。

ccb.text: 耶和华看见人罪恶深重，心中终日思想恶事，

csbs.text: 耶和华看到人在地上罪恶深重，而且人心里的每个意念动机终日都是邪恶的。
